name: Amish Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------PIE------------------------------------
1/2 cup Butter, cold
1/2 cup Walnuts, coarsely chopped
4 large Apples, peeled, cored, and thinly sliced (about 4 cups)
1 Unbaked 10-inch pie shell
1 cup Sugar
3 tablespoons Flour
1/2 teaspoon Cinnamon
1 large Egg
1 cup Heavy cream (for whipping)
1 teaspoon Vanilla
In a food processor bowl, mix the first six ingredients for streusel together. Add the butter and process until the mixture is crumbly; it should still have a dry look. Do not overprocess. Add the nuts and set aside.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place the apples in the pie shell.
In a small bowl, mix the sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
Beat the egg in a medium bowl, then add the cream and vanilla. Add the sugar mixture to the egg mixture and blend.
Pour over the apples.
Bake for 1 hour in the lower third of the oven. After 20 minutes, sprinkle streusel over top and continue baking about 40 minutes longer, or until the top puffs and is golden brown.
